title: Odfjell has Launched the First Operational Green Corridor between Brazil and Europe
content: Odfjell has launched the first operational green shipping corridor linking Brazil and Europe, with chemical tankers operating along a roughly 5,000-nautical-mile route. The company has secured a long-term supply of B24 sustainable biofuel in Rio Grande, enabling 12â€“15 voyages per year with significantly lower emissions compared with conventional fuels. The initiative is self-funded, aligns with international decarbonization targets, and is designed as a long-term commitment rather than a one-off trial. â€œBy covering the additional cost ourselves, we eliminate the financial element and move directly into operational implementation. It may not be a perfect corridor yet, but a solid start. Its success depends on collaboration across the value chain, and we are committed to developing it further together with relevant stakeholders,â€ Fotland says.
author: Analysts Account
